cad_specification:
from cadquery import Workplane

# Ring band dimensions (size 7 US)
ring_inner_diameter = 17.3  # mm
ring_thickness = 2.0  # mm
ring_width = 2.5  # mm

# Create ring band
result = (Workplane("XY")
    .circle((ring_inner_diameter + 2*ring_thickness)/2)
    .circle(ring_inner_diameter/2)
    .extrude(ring_width)
)

# Create prong setting base
setting_base = (Workplane("XY")
    .workplane(offset=ring_width)
    .circle(4.0)
    .extrude(2.0)
    .edges("|Z")
    .fillet(0.3)
)

# Add four prongs f...
